title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 4 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 4 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 4 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/07/2025
Today, DCE iron ore f futures jumped initially and then pulled back, maintaining a relatively strong oscillation throughout the day.The most- traded contract I2509 eventually closed at 732.5, with a daily increase of 0.62%. Steel mills purchased as needed, and with the weekend approaching, inquiries decreased. The market transaction atmosphere was moderate.
